buffmobs.config.title: BuffMobs Configuration
buffmobs.config.general.enabled.tooltip: Enable or disable the mod entirely. When disabled, all mobs lose their buffs.
buffmobs.config.general.visualEffects.to: Show particle effects on mobs that have status effects applied.
buffmobs.config.attributes.healthMultipl: Multiplies the base max health of all buffed mobs. 1.5 = 50% more HP.
buffmobs.config.attributes.damageMultipl: Multiplies the base attack damage of all buffed mobs. 1.5 = 50% more damage.
buffmobs.config.attributes.speedMultipli: Multiplies movement speed. Capped internally at 2x to avoid unhittable mobs.
buffmobs.config.attributes.attackSpeedMu: Multiplies the base attack speed of mobs.
buffmobs.config.attributes.armorAddition: Flat armor points added to mobs. 20 = full diamond armor equivalent.
buffmobs.config.attributes.armorToughnes: Flat armor toughness added to mobs. Reduces the effectiveness of high-damage hits.
buffmobs.config.effects.duration.tooltip: Duration of status effects in seconds. Use -1 for infinite (refreshed every second).
buffmobs.config.effects.strengthAmplifie: Strength effect level granted to mobs. 0 = disabled.
buffmobs.config.effects.speedAmplifier.t: Speed effect level granted to mobs. 0 = disabled.
buffmobs.config.effects.resistanceAmplif: Resistance effect level granted to mobs. 0 = disabled.
buffmobs.config.effects.regenerationAmpl: Regeneration effect level granted to mobs. 0 = disabled. Skipped for undead mobs.
buffmobs.config.effects.absorptionAmplif: Absorption effect level granted to mobs. 0 = disabled.
buffmobs.config.harmfulEffects.enabled.t: When enabled, buffed mobs have a chance to apply a harmful effect to the player on hit.
buffmobs.config.harmfulEffects.chance.to: Probability of a harmful effect being applied on each hit. 0.15 = 15% chance.
buffmobs.config.harmfulEffects.poisonDur: How long the Poison effect lasts on the player, in seconds.
buffmobs.config.harmfulEffects.slownessD: How long the Slowness effect lasts on the player, in seconds.
buffmobs.config.harmfulEffects.witherDur: How long the Wither effect lasts on the player, in seconds.
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.enabled.toolt: Progressively increases mob strength as in-game days pass.
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.interval.tool: Number of in-game days between each difficulty increase.
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.multiplier.to: How much the multiplier increases per interval. 0.1 = +10% per interval.
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.maxMultiplier: The maximum value the day scaling multiplier can reach.
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.showNotificat: Show a chat message to all players when the difficulty increases.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.dimensi: The dimension ID to apply scaling to. Example: minecraft:the_nether
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.healthP: Health multiplier for this dimension as a percentage. 200 = double HP.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.damageP: Damage multiplier for this dimension as a percentage.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.speedPe: Speed multiplier for this dimension as a percentage.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.attackS: Attack speed multiplier for this dimension as a percentage.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.armorAd: Flat armor points added to mobs in this dimension.
buffmobs.config.dimensionScaling.toughne: Flat armor toughness added to mobs in this dimension.
buffmobs.config.mobFilter.useWhitelist.t: If true, only mobs listed in the Whitelist will be buffed.
buffmobs.config.mobFilter.whitelist.tool: Mob IDs that will be buffed when Use Whitelist is enabled.
buffmobs.config.mobFilter.blacklist.tool: Mob IDs that will never be buffed. Format: minecraft:zombie
buffmobs.config.modidFilter.useWhitelist: If true, only mobs from mods in the Whitelist will be buffed.
buffmobs.config.modidFilter.whitelist.to: Mod IDs whose mobs will be buffed when Use Whitelist is enabled.
buffmobs.config.modidFilter.blacklist.to: Mod IDs whose mobs will never be buffed.
buffmobs.config.dimensionFilter.useWhite: If true, mobs are only buffed in dimensions listed in the Whitelist.
buffmobs.config.dimensionFilter.whitelis: Dimensions where mobs are buffed when Use Whitelist is enabled.
buffmobs.config.dimensionFilter.blacklis: Dimensions where mobs will never be buffed. Format: minecraft:the_nether
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.ena: Enables ranged mobs to change behavior when the player gets close.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.beh: How ranged mobs choose their combat style. Melee = always switch, Kite = always flee, Random = decided on spawn.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.swi: Distance in blocks at which a ranged mob switches behavior.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.mel: Speed boost applied when a mob enters melee mode. 1.2 = 20% faster.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.enc: Whether melee weapons given to ranged mobs can have enchantments.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.max: Maximum number of enchantments that can be applied to a single melee weapon.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.day: How many in-game days must pass for each enchantment to gain one level.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.sha: Day on which Sharpness becomes available on melee weapons.
Maximum level of Sharpness that can be applied.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.fir: Day on which Fire Aspect becomes available on melee weapons.
Maximum level of Fire Aspect that can be applied.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.kno: Day on which Knockback becomes available on melee weapons.
Maximum level of Knockback that can be applied.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.swe: Day on which Sweeping Edge becomes available on melee weapons.
Maximum level of Sweeping Edge that can be applied.
buffmobs.config.rangedMeleeSwitching.cus: Additional mob IDs that should be treated as ranged mobs for switching behavior.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.enabled.tool: When enabled, hostile and neutral mobs drink a regeneration potion when they fall below the health threshold.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.healthThresh: Fraction of max HP at which the potion is triggered. 0.20 = triggers below 20% HP.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.regenAmplifi: Level of the Regeneration effect applied. Undead mobs receive Absorption + direct heal instead.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.regenDuratio: How long the regeneration effect lasts in seconds.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.cooldownTick: Ticks between uses of the potion per mob. 600 = 30 seconds.
buffmobs.config.combatDraft.maxUses.tool: Maximum number of times a mob can use the potion per life. 0 = no limit.
buffmobs.config.mobPresets.enabled.toolt: When enabled, individual mobs can be assigned a preset that overrides the global multipliers.
buffmobs.config.mobPresets.mobMapping.to: Maps mob IDs to preset names. Format: modid:mob_id:preset_name
buffmobs.config.mobPresets.presetName.to: Internal name for this preset. Used in the Mob Mapping list below.
buffmobs.notify.day_scaling: Day %s - Mob Scaling: %sx | Next increase in %s day%s
buffmobs.config.dayScaling.notificationM: When to send day scaling notifications to players.
buffmobs.config.filter.useWhitelist.tool: If enabled, only entries listed in the Whitelist are affected. The Blacklist is ignored when this is on.
buffmobs.config.filter.whitelist.tooltip: List of IDs that are exclusively affected when Use Whitelist is enabled.
buffmobs.config.filter.blacklist.tooltip: List of IDs that are always excluded. Format: modid:entry_id
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.buffmobs: Makes hostile and neutral mobs stronger, faster, and more challenging with progressive difficulty scaling.
